title: dortmanna ocimoides
intro: Dortmanna ocimoides, also known as the Dortmann's mint or the marsh mint, is a perennial herb native to Europe, characterized by its square stem and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Dortmanna ocimoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. Dortmanna ocimoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
